item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 10min "Imagine if Arsenal do bottle it?!"
Are Arsenal in the process of bottling yet another league title?
The WHFC panel discuss this likelihood ahead of the title deciding match between Arsenal and Man City. 1 1 327

item.description:

The deadline for this week's Final One Standing Beat Judges league is 3pm Saturday.
